issuer_name_as_stated: Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Construction Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against the relevant parties. For criminal proceedings, I counted the 4 matters against our Company and the 1 matter against our Directors and Promoters, while excluding the 3 matters by our Company and the 0 matters by Directors and Promoters. Regulatory proceedings against the Company and Directors/Promoters are both 0, and tax proceedings against the Company are 0; no subsidiaries are listed. The aggregate amount against the Company is the stated table amount of ₹28.77 million, excluding the ₹1.26 million against Directors and Promoters and all amounts in the 'By' rows; ₹28.77 million converts to ₹2.877 crore. Contingent liabilities use the stated figure of ₹2,776.58 million as at March 31, 2023, converted to ₹277.658 crore, without re-summing. The top-five and top-ten customer concentrations are company-wide for the full fiscal year ended March 31, 2023, stated as percentages of revenue (the table's revenue figures correspond to revenue from operations): 80.92% and 93.46%, respectively. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million; conversion is million ÷ 10 to crore.
